items.title: VAR review: Arsenal's anger justified in non-red card, or Arteta's rant misguided?
items.summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta slammed the referees for not issuing a red card to Newcastle, but is he right to be so upset?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: NBA playoffs winners and losers: LeBron James struggles as Rockets stay alive, Payton Pritchard heats up
items.summary: The Raptors won ugly, the Spurs rallied against the Blazers and the Celtics crushed the 76ers and the Rockets stayed alive on Sunday
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Bangar: India selectors will be keenly watching Mohsin
items.summary: The LSG quick picked up 5 for 23 against KKR earning praise from Carlos Brathwaite as well
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
